cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this problem. So, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Today is her 16th birthday. The question is asking for the date one year ago from today in MM/DD/YYYY format. Let me break it down step by step. First, I need to determine today's date. Jane was born on the last day of February. Now, February typically has 28 days, except in leap years when it has 29. Since 2001 is not a leap year (because leap years are divisible by 4, and 2001 divided by 4 is 500.25, so no),
